name: apimesh-security-headers
title: HTTP Security Headers Audit
description: Audit 10 HTTP security headers with A+ to F grading. Checks CSP, HSTS, X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy, and more.

url.title: URL to audit
url.description: URL to audit security headers for (e.g. https://example.com)
